locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Dry pipe sprinkler system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable.
6 control valves inspected; all were found in the open position.
Tamper switches were not all connected.
Water flow alarm tested and operational.
Sprinkler heads in fair visual condition with minor corrosion observed.
Adequate supply of spare sprinkler heads available in cabinet.
Water supply adequate: static pressure 42 psi, residual pressure 49 psi, flow 1029 GPM.
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors.
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room.

recommendations.description: Remove or relocate combustible storage to maintain at least 18 inches of clearance below sprinkler deflectors.
Correct exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection found a NFPA 13-compliant dry pipe sprinkler system with adequate water supply and operational alarm devices. The system passed overall, but deficiencies were noted involving sprinkler clearance and electrical room wiring conditions.
